summary: This bundle records deterministic proof that evaluation proof class remains visible in downstream evaluation summaries and report proof summaries.

evidenceScope.targetSurface: evaluation proof metadata projection into summaries and reports
evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only proof-class visibility in evaluation summaries and report proof summaries is marked satisfied; this does not prove runner readiness catalog completeness or product-runner honesty.
notClaimed: Every eval surface has a ready product runner
Every report consumer interprets proofClass correctly
Optimization preflight behavior is covered by this bundle

notableAssertions: BuildAppChatEvaluationSummary preserves proof.proofClass from the input proof packet
BuildReportPacket exposes proofSummary.productRunnerProofReadiness as blocked when an app claim lacks product-runner proof
BuildReportPacket exposes proofSummary.proofClassCounts so report readers can see the downstream proof class instead of only a readiness verdict

decision.reason: The focused runtime tests prove proofClass survives into eval summaries and report proofSummary.proofClassCounts, keeping weak proof classes visible to downstream readers.
